top_signals.title: Iran Strikes 5 Gulf Countries as Regional Escalation Continues
top_signals.summary: Iran has opened a new front across the Gulf, striking countries that host U.S. forces and sit beside the oil, gas, and shipping infrastructure sustaining the global energy system. Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, and Jordan all reported Iranian missile or drone activity on Sunday after the United States hit a reported 140 military targets inside Iran in response to an Iranian strike on a commercial vessel near the Strait of Hormuz. The heaviest confirmed damage occurred in Kuwait, where a drone struck an offshore drilling platform operated by Kuwait…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
top_signals.summary: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran widens attacks on US bases in Gulf, Hormuz tensions lift oil prices - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran widens attacks on US bases in Gulf, Hormuz tensions lift oil prices  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold price loses its grip: World’s 50 biggest mining companies shed $228 billion in Q2
top_signals.summary: Gold's slide back below $4,000 an ounce wipes out most of mining's 2026 gains, but the diversified giants – led by a resurgent BHP – is staging a comeback.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Wall Street set for biggest haul from investment banking fees in 4 years
top_signals.summary: Top US banks benefit from revival of large deals as AI optimism and strong consumer fuel market rally
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SBI Holdings, Solana Foundation partner to build Japan-based onchain financial market
top_signals.summary: SBI and the Solana Foundation are collaborating to build an onchain financial market with SBI R3 rebranding to SBI Solana Global.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
